programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry has second thoughts after helping Elaine get an apartment in his building.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Elaine and Jerry are left stranded at a party after George goes home with his date.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Part 1 - In this final episode of the series, Jerry, George, Elaine and Kramer are arrested for their callous indifference to a car jacking victim.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Part 2 - In this final episode of the series, Jerry, George, Elaine and Kramer are arrested for their callous indifference to a car jacking victim.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry is ecstatic that a woman he met on the road is coming to stay with him in New York, but his flabbergasted when he discovers she's engaged to be married.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry finds that trying to end a friendship with Joel, a guy he's known and disliked for years, is harder than breaking up with a woman.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Elaine talks Jerry into hiring a friend who's working his way through college by cleaning people's homes. When a statue is discovered missing, he suspects the student. But Jerry is unsure how to handle getting it back.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George, ever the hypochondriac, thinks he's having a heart attack and, at Kramer's urging, seeks the advice of a "holistic" healer.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: A stand-up comedian and his three offbeat friends weather the pitfalls and payoffs of life in New York City in the '90s.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: A stand-up comedian and his three offbeat friends weather the pitfalls and payoffs of life in New York City in the '90s.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: A stand-up comedian and his three offbeat friends weather the pitfalls and payoffs of life in New York City in the '90s.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: A stand-up comedian and his three offbeat friends weather the pitfalls and payoffs of life in New York City in the '90s.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: A stand-up comedian and his three offbeat friends weather the pitfalls and payoffs of life in New York City in the '90s.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: The library asks Jerry about a book he checked out in 1971 and never returned, so Jerry looks up an old girlfriend for his defense against a library cop.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry and Elaine visit Jerry's parents in Florida, where Jerry's father is being honored by his condominium association. At dinner, Jerry admires a special astronaut's pen owned by one of the association members. When Jerry accepts it as a gift, he starts a mountain of tension with his folks, who feel Jerry should have refused.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: The four get stuck in a parking garage for hours when they forget where they parked.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: A stand-up comedian and his three offbeat friends weather the pitfalls and payoffs of life in New York City in the '90s.
